notes: I share a "steam library" NTFS partition between both my Linux and Windows OS installs.  I installed the game to the partition using Windows.  Booted into Linux, ran the game and it worked without an issue.

notes: works out of the box, but performance isnt that great. Im sure performance will improve.
title: ATLAS

notes: Needed to run it in low-memory mode and with low settings, otherwise UE4 fails to create textures sometimes, resulting in a crash. Otherwise as playable as on Windows (including crashes). Successful teleportation to multiple locations and even between servers without any issue.
title: ATLAS
